III. 綜合測驗 ( 第 22-31 題,每題 2 分,共 20 分 ) 說明:以下兩篇短文,共有 10 個空格,為第 22 至 31 題,每題有四個選項,請依各篇短文文意, 選出一個最適合該空格的答案。 ▲ 下篇短文共有 5 個空格,為第 22 至 26 題,請依短文文意,選出一個最適合該空格的答案。 Mercy Ships is an international charity. It uses its growing fleet of hospital ships to deliver free health care to developing nations. In the global medical mission, Mercy Ships needs a variety of supports. Volunteering, 22, is one of them. There are volunteer positions in different areas, 23 housekeeping, deck crew, doctors and nurses and everything in between. The system of the main onboard computer and the satellite communications is 24 support that Mercy Ships needs. The images of samples 25 from patients are loaded onto the Internet. Experts from thousands of miles away log in to a secure web page, gain 26 to the samples, analyze them, and provide immediate diagnoses or consultation by email or by telephone. Of course, there are many other supports it needs. In short, considering the level of success and positivity that Mercy Ships garners, it can be hoped that many more such charitable organizations will come into operation.

It would cause the world’s economic recession. ▲ 閱讀下文,回答第 37-41 題。 Dear Abby: We have a large break room at work where we gather to have lunch. Usually there are six to eight nurses gathering at one time. Sometimes we bring lunch from home; other times we order out individually. One co-worker constantly helps herself to others’ food without it being offered. For example, if you order fries with your lunch, she will reach over and grab some off your plate without asking. Gosh! Did she clean her hands? We feel it is rude and unsanitary. How do we politely ask her to stop doing this? Hungry Nurses Dear Hungry Nurses: Rudeness is hurtful, but removing yourself from the situation is the surest way to avoid more rude behavior from the same person. Walk away, even if they’re still talking to you! If they’re a stranger, you’ll never have to deal with them again. If they’re a friend or a colleague, they’ll soon learn that being rude to you gets them exactly nowhere. Abby
